signal_evidence.services_demand: Equity and options trading volumes are setting new monthly records... crypto volumes for both Robinhood and for Bitstamp are at 6-month highs.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We ask existing businesses to improve process and use technology so that their cost growth stays in the low single digits... adjusted OpEx and SBC was up just 6% year-over-year.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Just last week, we moved the rebate rate to 85 bps... the blended rate at 58 basis points in Q2; in July, kind of in the mid-60s.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I tend not to really worry about competitors unless they have a product in market that's actually beating us... this is probably the least diversified you should ever see Robinhood.
